fields.label: Artists
fields.name: artists
fields.instructions: Use this field to credit contributing artists and designers.

fields.label: Web Address For Event Information
fields.name: event_page_external_address
fields.instructions: By providing a web address, the default event page will be overridden and calendar links will point to this address.

fields.label: CAES Calendar
fields.name: caes_department
fields.instructions: Select which calendars to show this event on.

fields.label: Description
fields.name: description
fields.instructions: Describe what the event is about and who it’s for.

fields.label: Where is this event taking place?
fields.name: event_location_type

fields.label: Address
fields.name: location_google_map
fields.instructions: Use the map search to find the address for the event location.

fields.label: Parking Info
fields.name: parking_info
fields.instructions: Include details on where and how to park, if needed.

fields.label: Online Location Web Address Label Text
fields.name: online_location_web_address_label
fields.instructions: Use descriptive link text. I.e. "Zoom Webinar Link"

fields.label: Online Location Details
fields.name: online_location
fields.instructions: I.e. instructions for attending the online event.

fields.label: Start Date
fields.name: start_date
fields.instructions: If event is a single day, you can just select "start date."

fields.label: End Date
fields.name: end_date
fields.instructions: If event is multi-day, you can select "end date."

fields.label: Publish/Display Date
fields.name: publish_display_date
fields.instructions: When should this event start displaying on the calendar?

fields.label: Cost
fields.name: cost
fields.instructions: Enter the cost, ie "$10" or "Free to public"

fields.label: Contact
fields.name: contact
fields.instructions: Search for contact. If contact is not in the CAES personnel database, use "Custom Contact"

fields.label: Featured Image
fields.name: featured_image
fields.instructions: Only JPG and PNG formats are accepted. Use Canva template "Website - Wordpress - Featured Image." Images should be no larger than 1200 x 900 pixels, and no larger than 1 MB in file size.

fields.label: Additional Attachments or Links
fields.name: documents
fields.instructions: Examples include conference schedules, itineraries, etc. You can add multiple documents or links by clicking the plus sign.

sub_fields.label: Link Label Text
sub_fields.name: link_label_text
sub_fields.instructions: Use descriptive link text. I.e. "Conference Agenda"

sub_fields.label: File
sub_fields.name: file
sub_fields.instructions: Only PDF files are accepted. Maximum file size: 5 MB. Please ensure your PDFs are accessible.

sub_fields.label: File Label Text
sub_fields.name: file_label_text
sub_fields.instructions: Use descriptive link text. I.e. "Conference Agenda"

fields.label: Artists
fields.name: artists
fields.instructions: Use this field to credit contributing artists and designers.

fields.label: Artists
fields.name: artists
fields.instructions: Use this field to credit contributing artists and designers.

fields.label: Disable PDF download
fields.name: disable_pdf_download
fields.message: Enable to remove the PDF download button on the front end publication.
